heading: BORROWING, WITHHOLDING, OR DIVERTING SPECIAL FUNDS PROHIBITED.
operative_text: The Legislature shall not have power to borrow, or in any manner divert from its purpose, any special fund that may, or ought to, come into the Treasury; and shall make it penal for any person or persons to borrow, withhold or in any manner to divert from its purpose any special fund, or any part thereof.
